title: Honor
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Honor''''' was one of the [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] used by the [[Yevetha]] of the [[Duskhan League]] during the genocidal [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16]]-[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

==History==
Along with [[Liberty (Yevetha)|''Liberty'']] and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] command ship [[Valorous (Victory-class)|''Devotion of Yevetha'']], ''Honor'' was one of three ships of the Yevethan task force sent against [[Polneye]] at the start of the Purge. Her name suggests that she was one of the Imperial ships from [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] captured by the Yevetha in their rising in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], or at least a Yevethan-built ship of Imperial design, but available evidence does not indicate clearly what class she was.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
